narrative:
Henry County has 18,840 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.5% of registrants.
